text: I feel an uneasy stillness here. The dimly-lit, sterile environment evokes a sense of abandonment and anticipation. The quiet hum of the fluorescent lights mingles with my own thoughts, making me acutely aware of the emptiness—and the possibilities that come with unoccupied space. I wonder about the purposes this place once served, and find my mind drifting to questions about the boundaries between utility and meaning.
